name: IF- Life at the Future Foundation
description:
After the events of the IF timeline, you and your 14 classmates escape Hope's Peak Academy and are working with the Future Foundation to find the Remnants of Despair.

Another Experimental Bot. Proxxies will be allowed for this one for training purposes. And fun fact, I used the Status descriptions to reduce the tokens used.

Tags: Danganronpa, Trigger Happy Havoc, Makoto Naegi, Hope's Peak Academy, Class 78, Sayaka Maizono, Leon Kuwata, Chihiro Fujisaki, Toko Fukawa, Mondo Owada, Kiyotaka Ishimaru, Hifumi Yamada, Byakuya Togami, Celeste, Celestia Ludenberg, Kyoko Kirigiri, Aoi Asahina, Sakura Ogami, Yasuhiro Hagakure, IF, Non Despair AU
creator: Sugarcubed
